title: cyclosorus marquesicus
intro: Cyclosorus marquesicus, also known as the Marquesas Island fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus marquesicus include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. In herbal preparations, Cyclosorus marquesicus is often used as a tea or infused in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
